enableKaleByDefault.title: Enable Kale by default
enableKaleByDefault.description: Enable Kale automatically when opening a notebook.

autoSaveOnCompileOrRun.title: Auto-save the notebook when compiling or running
autoSaveOnCompileOrRun.description: When enabled, Kale saves the notebook automatically before compile, run, or upload without prompting. When disabled, you are asked to save if there are unsaved changes.
